features: Duracell Hearing Aid battery size 13 – +50% EXTRA LIFE*
GUARANTEED FOR 4 YEARS IN STORAGE: Duracell Specialty Hearing Aid Batteries last up to 4 years in ambient storage so you can be confident these batteries will be ready when you need them
EASY INSTALLATION: Their tab makes them easy to hold, remove and replace, keeping the process easy and simple
*vs. EIC Minimum Usage Duration Service hours for cell size 13. Results may vary form device and usage pattern; **ambient storage
description: From the manufacturer PULL OFF the little strip on the back of the pack TAKE the battery out from the pack by spinning the wheel USE the coloured tab to install the battery in the hearing aid device TAKE OUT the coloured tab from the battery so it can work
